bead.title: B22d-b: cmd/agent_cmd.go:1462 RunViaService → RunWithConfigViaService
bead.description:
Step b/h of B22d decomposition.

Switch cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go:1462's RunViaService call to a new RunWithConfigViaService that threads a ResolvedConfig through the call.

In-scope:
- cli/cmd/agent_cmd.go (one call site)
- cli/internal/agent/service_run.go (add RunWithConfigViaService alongside RunViaService — does not delete the legacy variant; that's step h)

Out-of-scope:
- Other agent_cmd call sites
bead.acceptance: field RunWithConfigViaService declared. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
